hero.subtitle: From SEO to AI, from websites to performance ads — we deliver 9 end-to-end digital services under one roof. Focus on growing your business while the masters handle your digital.
hero.supportingLine: Trusted by 1,000+ clients across Indonesia in 8 industries since 2018. AI-leveraged workflows deliver 3x faster than conventional agencies — with the same premium Jakarta tier quality.
hero.trustBadge: No minimum contracts · No hidden costs · Free 60-minute strategy session

manifesto.title: An agency that gets business,
manifesto.titleHighlight: not just one that sells services.
manifesto.p1: Para Suhu Digital was born from a simple observation: too many agencies in Indonesia make sweet promises upfront, only to fumble the delivery. Projects drag on, communication disappears, results fall short of expectations — and the client always pays the price.
manifesto.p2: We believe digital marketing isn't about momentary tricks or growth hacks. It's about consistent systems, disciplined execution, and strategy that genuinely connects with business goals. That's what sets us apart.
manifesto.p3: By combining senior-level strategy with modern AI workflows, we deliver the quality of tier-1 Jakarta agencies at speeds and prices that still make sense — whether you're a bootstrapped startup or a corporation in scaling mode.

servicesGrid.title: 9 Master Services,
servicesGrid.intro: Need a website that converts? Done. Ads with proven ROAS? Done. A mobile app that sticks on users' phones? Done. Need to clean up your brand's reputation on Google? Absolutely. Pick what you need — or take everything and let us become your strategic digital partner.

whyUs.title: Many agencies in Indonesia.
whyUs.subtitle: We don't take on every project that walks through the door. We choose clients we can genuinely impact, and we deliver to a standard we refuse to compromise. These four principles back our results guarantee.

reasons.title: Fast without quality compromise
reasons.description: Projects that typically take 3 months, we finish in 3 weeks. Not because we rush — but because our internal workflows are automated with premium AI tools. Quality control stays manual, owned by senior strategists.

reasons.title: AI-leveraged, master-driven
reasons.description: We use AI for execution (research, content production, automation), but strategy and critical decisions stay with humans. The result: working like a team of 10x with senior-level output.

reasons.title: Founders hands-on, not just sales talk
reasons.description: You talk directly to the people doing the work — not an account manager who has to 'check with the technical team'. Direct communication, fast decisions, no telephone-game scope creep.

reasons.title: Pay for results, not promises
reasons.description: We're transparent about targets and deliverables. If we miss a milestone, there's real accountability — not lengthy excuses. Performance-based contracts available for Suhu Ads and SEO clients.

whyUs.footnote: Want to first check if your project fits our way of working? Initial 30-60 minute discussion, free.

industries.title: Specialists in
industries.intro: Each industry has different consumer behavior, regulations, and marketing playbooks. Rather than being a shallow generalist, we've chosen to go deep in these 8 industries — with concrete portfolios, case studies, and battle-tested keyword research.
industries.moreSoon: Your industry isn't here? We can still work together — we're used to onboarding new industries with deep upfront research.

process.title: Master process,
process.subtitle: We don't like projects that drag, communication that gets tangled, or results that aren't clear. These four stages keep clients calm from kickoff to launch — and beyond.

steps.title: Discovery & Discussion
steps.desc: We talk about your business, targets, current state, and competitors. Free 30-60 minutes via Zoom or in person at our SCBD office (IDX Tower 1). No obligation, no hard selling.

steps.title: Proposal & Roadmap
steps.desc: You get a complete proposal: detailed scope, weekly timeline, deliverables per milestone, transparent pricing. Including assumptions, risks, and exit clauses — everything in black and white.

steps.title: Execution in Master Mode
steps.desc: We work with AI-leveraged workflows. Weekly progress updates via Notion + WhatsApp group, access to staging environments, and weekly sync calls. You'll never feel left in the dark.

steps.title: Launch & Optimize
steps.desc: After launch, we don't disappear. 30-day bug-fix warranty, optional maintenance retainer, and scaling options for the next phase. We invest long-term with serious clients.

approach.title: We are Para Suhu Digital.
approach.intro: Para Suhu Digital is a collective of senior practitioners who've spent years deep in their respective crafts — gathered under one roof to work on your business with experience that can't be faked.

pillars.title: Senior in every discipline
pillars.desc: Every service is owned directly by a practitioner with over a decade in the field. Not juniors guessing their way through, but real masters who've delivered hundreds of projects across industries.

pillars.title: 9 services, 1 team
pillars.desc: Web, apps, software, SEO, ads, social media, digital marketing, and creative — each owned by its own specialist. No need to juggle multiple agencies for full-stack capacity.

pillars.title: Output born of experience
pillars.desc: Every strategy, design, and technical decision is grounded in real-world hours in the field — not generic output or recycled templates. That's why our work has depth and actually fits your business context.

pillars.title: Fast execution, consistent quality
pillars.desc: Experts know the safe shortcuts. What usually takes weeks, we ship in days — without compromising quality, because best practices live in the team's heads, not in a Google search.

faq.title: Questions clients
faq.subtitle: Before consultation, clients usually have these questions. We answer them openly here — so you can assess whether we fit your needs.

items.q: How long does a project typically take at Para Suhu?
items.a: Depends on scope: landing pages 2-3 weeks, company profiles 3-4 weeks, e-commerce 4-8 weeks, custom software/apps 8-16 weeks, ad campaigns can launch within 7 days, SEO results start showing 3-6 months. Detailed timelines are broken down per milestone in our proposals.

items.q: Does Para Suhu work with clients outside Jakarta?
items.a: Yes, 100%. Our team is Jakarta-based (HQ at IDX Tower 1, SCBD), but 60% of our clients are from outside Jakarta — Surabaya, Bandung, Bali, Medan, even Singapore. Our workflow is remote-first with proven tooling.

Depends on the project type. One-time projects (website, app, software): 50% deposit, 30% mid-project, 20% before launch. Retainer projects (SEO, Ads, Socmed): monthly with a 3-month minimum contract. All via corporate bank transfer with formal invoices and NPWP. Custom payment terms available for corporate clients.

Of course. We regularly work with tier-1 corporate clients who have strict legal requirements. Mutual NDAs are available before in-depth discussions. Client source code, data, and strategies are never shared with third parties — including being used as case studies without written consent.

items.q: What if we're not satisfied with the results?
items.a: Every project has milestone reviews. If concerns arise mid-project, we revisit scope and adjust. For development projects, there's a free 30-day post-launch bug-fix warranty. For Ads & SEO, contracts are flexible monthly — you can stop anytime with 30 days notice, no penalty.

items.q: How big is the Para Suhu team?
items.a: Currently, we're a lean senior team with extensive AI workflows. Every project is led by a founder or senior strategist who's hands-on. For larger executions, we partner with a network of pre-vetted specialist freelancers. You'll never get handed off to a 'fresh-out-of-college junior account executive'.

items.q: Do you work with sensitive industries (like online gaming, finance)?
items.a: Yes. We have specialized playbooks for industries with strict regulatory or platform policy constraints — online gaming (Meta/Google policy), finance (OJK), clinics (BPOM, medical licensing), education (Ministry of Education). Our team understands compliance, not just growth-at-all-cost.

items.q: Can all deliverables be in English?
items.a: Yes. Websites, applications, documentation, and reporting are available in 2 languages (ID/EN) by default. For clients with international stakeholders, we regularly deliver bilingual or English-only output with native-level copywriters.

faq.footer: Have another question? Just send us a WhatsApp or email — we usually respond within 2 working hours.

footer.tagline: The Masters of Digital Marketing in Indonesia. A digital agency that handles all your business needs — from websites to ads, from SEO to AI automation. Based in Jakarta, serving all of Indonesia.

aboutPage.title: We're not the kind
aboutPage.hero: Para Suhu Digital was born from one simple observation: too many agencies in Indonesia promise the world but deliver a mess. We're here to fix that.
aboutPage.p1Pre: Since 2018, the Para Suhu founder has worked with
aboutPage.p1Post: across Indonesia as an independent digital marketer. Property, clinics, restaurants, education — many industries explored. Many lessons learned.
aboutPage.p2: In 2024, when AI matured, we saw the opportunity: deliver premium-agency quality at speed and margin that actually makes sense — for clients and for us.
aboutPage.p3Pre: In 2026, PT Suhu Digital Agency officially launched. We positioned ourselves not as a "cheap agency" — but as
aboutPage.p3Highlight: an agency that knows how to leverage modern tools
aboutPage.p3Post: , so your business gets maximum results from a reasonable budget.
aboutPage.p4Pre: We chose the name "Suhu" deliberately. Not out of arrogance — in Indonesian culture,
aboutPage.p4Highlight: "suhu" means a master who's trained for a long time
aboutPage.p4Post: — not a beginner just selling services.

privacy.section1: We collect information you voluntarily provide when you fill in the contact form, subscribe to our newsletter, or communicate with us. This includes name, email address, phone number, company name, and project details you send.
privacy.section2: Collected information is used to: (a) respond to your inquiries & follow-ups; (b) deliver agreed-upon services and project requirements; (c) communicate about active projects; (d) internal marketing (newsletter & product updates), which you can unsubscribe from anytime.
privacy.section3: We're committed to protecting your personal data. We use industry-standard security measures including HTTPS encryption, secure authentication systems, and internal access restrictions. However, no internet transmission is 100% secure, and we can't guarantee absolute security.
privacy.section4: We don't sell, trade, or transfer your personal information to external third parties without consent, except to trusted partners that help us operate (e.g., hosting, email service, analytics). These partners agree to keep your information confidential.
privacy.section5: Our website uses cookies to improve user experience and analytics to understand visit patterns. You can refuse cookies through your browser settings.
privacy.section6Pre: You have the right to: request access to your personal data; request correction of inaccurate data; request data deletion; opt out of marketing use. Contact us at
privacy.section7: Questions about this privacy policy can be directed to:

terms.section1Post: (Para Suhu Digital). "Client" refers to the individual or entity using our services. "Services" refers to all products and services we provide, including but not limited to website development, applications, SEO, ads, social media, creative, and AI integration.
terms.section2: All project quotes we provide are valid for 30 calendar days unless otherwise specified. A formal work agreement (SOW - Statement of Work) will be created after the client approves the proposal and pays the agreed DP.
terms.section3: Standard payment terms: 50% DP upfront before execution begins, and 50% balance before final delivery. For retainer projects (SEO, Ads, Social), payment is made in advance each month. Payment delays of more than 14 days may result in project pause or cancellation.
terms.section4: Each project includes a number of revisions defined in the SOW. Revisions or scope changes beyond what's agreed will incur additional charges based on hourly rates or a separate quote.
terms.section5: Upon full payment, the client receives full ownership of final deliverables (except components using third-party licenses such as fonts, stock images, library code). Para Suhu Digital reserves the right to showcase the work as portfolio unless there's an NDA or specific clause.
terms.section6: Each project includes a 30-day warranty period after launch for fixes to bugs or issues originating from our work. Warranty does not cover new feature changes, routine content updates, or issues caused by third-party modifications.
terms.section7: Cancellation by the client: DP is non-refundable. If work has progressed more than 50%, the client remains obligated to pay based on progress. Cancellation by us: proportional refund based on unfinished progress.
terms.section8: Both parties agree to maintain confidentiality of business information exchanged during cooperation. A separate NDA can be created upon client request.
terms.section9: This agreement is governed by the laws of the Republic of Indonesia. Any disputes will be resolved through deliberation or through the competent court in South Jakarta.
terms.section10: Questions about these terms can be directed to:

careersPage.title: Become a
careersPage.hero: We're looking for people who genuinely want to become experts in their craft — not job-hoppers, not paycheck-chasers. At Para Suhu Digital, you'll work alongside senior practitioners, ship real projects for real clients, and have room to grow — across 9 disciplines if you're curious enough.
careersPage.whyIntro: What makes Para Suhu different isn't just the projects — it's how we build the people behind them.

pillars.title: Learn from masters
pillars.desc: Every team is led directly by senior practitioners with 10+ years in their craft. You'll be mentored hands-on — not onboarded with a Notion tutorial.

pillars.title: Real projects, real clients
pillars.desc: From early-stage startups to corporate brands — you'll ship work that actually launches, gets measured, and becomes a case study you can put on your CV.

pillars.title: 9 disciplines, 1 roof
pillars.desc: Web, apps, software, SEO, ads, social, digital marketing, creative, AI. There's room to cross-skill into other disciplines — not stuck in a single silo forever.

pillars.title: Output > politics
pillars.desc: No political layers, no marathon meetings that go nowhere. What we care about: the quality of your work and the impact on clients.
